快手号hxsp1024sad","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8h2SYH08yblZjPqUmSi9f53GT4k8+jXMYPTpDz/9qiC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1fd97ca21a3945db91a9c04cd6ccaef4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776623059\u0026x-signature=VIFS4ukJKSNr87QFdvCMiBUHycQ%3D","user_id":"2263262523298267","user_name":"忧郁的黑道神78"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2263262523298267","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596258357611072537","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：三中扛把子林峰，靠一双铁拳护住兄弟周全，却因替发小讨公道，把职高恶势力打得满地找牙，也把自己的学籍彻底砸进了尘埃里。踏出校门的那一刻，少年的青涩被市井的风刮散，一条刀光剑影的江湖路，在他脚下缓缓铺开。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3f3e084589e77f6d4fcbda6071a2a1f4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"忧郁的黑道神78","author_id":"","book_id":"7596258357611072537","book_name":"峰行黑道","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596259092637696537","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"56462"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"31","tags":"都市日常,都市","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3f3e084589e77f6d4fcbda6071a2a1f4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779270642\u0026x-signature=V%2BJDxmLnh%2FGFOydDpSaNecY4Gt8
